sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63930" key="loutropoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λουτρο-ποιός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n63930.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bath-attendant</tr_>, title of play by Anaxilas.</sense> </entryFree>
